End of year | Intraday post (31/Dec)

Weekly post:

"This time is different" | Weekly post (29/Dec - 02/Jan)

Last week, I expressed that I’m not a fan of a big Santa-rally anymore, after the tape left a lot of fragility behind, while geo risk premium and stagflation risk remains high. Voilá…

Soon - maybe after New Year - I will drop a post updating the earlier “AI bubble” post. A lot of challanges are coming for 2026…

Now, let’s jump in to the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Net speed profile is negative. Customers are buying vol into both direction, but like 4x more vol to the upside, while vol of vol remains sold today into both direction.

Centroid is at 6907.04, behaving as a strong wall for the spot.

Downside pivot is at 6878.85downside target is at 6841.32 (margin of error is 6815, if vol catches up), we have a significant support at 6860/50 that can swallow downside momentum if it’s low volume.The target is sticky after 2PM.

Upside pivot is at 6918.12 and 6924.26 more acceleration. Target is 6931.37, rejecting the spot, and pins towards 6920Low probability, but the profile gives an opportunity for the price to stabilize to 6950, if vol is bid at 6942

The centroid is acting like a line in the sand today. EOY positioning is supportive in terms of passive flows, but after we can expect some suppressive hedge unwind into Friday.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
